code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let tok = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let a = if n < 0
      0 - n
    else
      n
    end
    if i == 0
      best = n
      best_abs = a
    else
      if a < best_abs
        best = n
        best_abs = a
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("min_abs=#{best}")
when None
  println("min_abs=0")
end
